mapper.insert:
insert into osh_site_tag_relation (site_id, tag_id, delete_flag, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) values
(#{siteId}, #{tagId}, 0, now(), now(), #{userId}, #{userId})
mapper.select:
select tag.id, tag.tag_name, ostr.site_id FROM osh_site_tag_relation ostr left join osh_site_tag tag ON ostr.tag_id = tag.id where ostr.delete_flag = 0 and tag.delete_flag = 0 and ostr.site_id IN
#{item}
